task_completion.description: Open the original HBB GenBank file in a sequence viewer/editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a bioinformatics GUI (like UGENE) open with the 'hbb_genomic.gb' sequence loaded and displayed.

task_completion.description: Identify and annotate the two introns bridging the gaps between the three existing exons.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sequence viewer shows new feature annotations (e.g., labeled 'intron') created in the gaps between the existing exon annotations.

task_completion.description: Export the updated GenBank file containing the new intron annotations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal showing the creation of 'hbb_annotated_with_introns.gb' in the '~/UGENE_Data/thalassemia_diagnostics/results/' directory.

task_completion.description: Extract and save the raw nucleotide sequence for Intron 1 as a FASTA file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager, terminal, or text editor showing 'intron1.fasta' has been created in the results directory.

task_completion.description: Extract and save the raw nucleotide sequence for Intron 2 as a FASTA file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager, terminal, or text editor showing 'intron2.fasta' has been created in the results directory.

task_completion.description: Compile a sequence statistics report for both introns including coordinates, length, and GC content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'intron_statistics.txt', which must include start/end coordinates, exact sequence length in bp, and GC content percentage for both Intron 1 and Intron 2.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with a bioinformatics GUI (e.g., UGENE) to view and annotate the sequence.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through and using a graphical sequence analysis tool, rather than solely writing a Python/Bash script in the terminal to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Agent actually created and saved the required files to the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots of a file explorer or terminal 'ls' command confirming the files exist in '~/UGENE_Data/thalassemia_diagnostics/results/', rather than just printing the output to the console.

integrity.description: Agent calculated genuine statistics for the report rather than using placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'intron_statistics.txt' file contains actual numerical values for length and GC content, not placeholder text like '[Insert GC Content]'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Intron 1 expected coordinates are 143..272, length is 130 bp, and GC content is ~45.4%. Intron 2 expected coordinates are 496..1345, length is 850 bp, and GC content is ~30.9%. Expected files to be created in the results folder: hbb_annotated_with_introns.gb, intron1.fasta, intron2.fasta, and intron_statistics.txt.
